description: Jiaying, Lincoln, and Gordon supervise the S.H.I.E.L.D. prisoners on the Iliad. Jiaying forces Agents Weaver and Oliver to expand the emergency beacon signal, threatening them with the deadly Terrigen Crystals. Lincoln expresses growing doubts about Jiaying's methods, but Gordon defends her as necessary for the Inhumans’ survival, emphasizing the perceived threat from S.H.I.E.L.D.

transcript.line: Take a case of crystals down there. Load the rest on the Quinjet.
We have a problem. I disabled the communication systems, but an emergency beacon was sent out to Coulson's base. It's hard-wired, and there's no way to cancel it without the proper code.
Do one of you have the code?
I suggest you surrender peacefully. When Coulson gets the message, he'll come at you with everything he has.

Coulson's being dealt with. I don't need you to cancel the beacon. I want you to expand it. This ship and Coulson's base aren't the full extent of S.H.I.E.L.D.'s operations. Expand the beacon. Invite them all.
You want them to know we're here?
We have to show them what we're capable of. It's the only way they'll ever leave us alone.
We don't know what you're planning, but we'll play no part in it. Hands off, you freak!
What are you doing? Let him go!
Do you like rare gems?
You don't think you can bribe me.
It's not a bribe. It's an incentive.
Expand the beacon, or there will be more.
If we don't cut that beacon, it'll bring every available agent racing here.
And she plans to do that to all of them.
The problem is, it's hard-wired, clear on the other side of the ship, with a dozen ginger ninjas and god knows who else standing in the way.
But we're still gonna try.
Hell yeah.
Well, his physical changes have improved.
Careful. I'm a married man. Sorry, Phil. This looks expensive.
We have a tab running.
Sir, the carrier's distress call, it's expanded to all channels.
Jiaying used Cal's distraction to take over that ship in minutes.
Yeah. It's intimidating.
You get May and Hunter on the line? We'll need every asset we've got to shut these Inhumans down.
I tried, sir. Uh, their team's already gone dark.
